title: SLO contracts (design-time half)
manager: Service-level-objective contracts expressed as PCTL in contract position — "99.9% of requests settle within 100 steps" as a design-time obligation the checker verifies against the model. This is the design-time half of SLOs (the runtime-monitor half comes in the survival era): it lets you state performance and reliability targets as verifiable properties of the machine, not just hopes you measure after deployment and discover you missed.
cs: SLO contracts = PCTL in contract position (design-time half); verified against the model; the runtime-monitor half is era 4; builds on the probabilistic tier (W8.5).
